title: AI-Assisted Bug Hunting Practical
description: Hands-on exercises for AI-assisted debugging using Claude Code with a vanilla Node.js Task Management API

exercises.title: Basic Bug Fix
exercises.description: Investigate a production error log, identify the bug, fix it, and write a test to prevent regression. Start here if you're new to AI-assisted debugging.

steps.title: Read the error log
steps.instruction: Ask Claude: 'Read the file logs/error-2024-01-20.log and explain what went wrong'

steps.title: Create a GitHub issue
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to create a GitHub issue describing the bug, its root cause, and expected behaviour

steps.title: Fix the bug
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to locate and fix the bug in the source code

steps.title: Write a regression test
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to write a test that would have caught this bug before it reached production

steps.title: Create a PR
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to create a pull request with your fix and test

exercises.title: Frontend Integration Bug
exercises.description: Debug an issue reported by a frontend consumer of the API. Medium difficulty — requires understanding request/response contracts.

steps.title: Read the error log
steps.instruction: Ask Claude: 'Read the file logs/frontend-2024-01-21.log and explain what the frontend team is reporting'

steps.title: Create a GitHub issue
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to create a GitHub issue describing the bug with details from the log

steps.title: Fix the bug
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to find and fix the root cause in the API code

steps.title: Write a regression test
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to write a test that validates the correct behaviour

steps.title: Create a PR
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to create a pull request with your fix and test

exercises.title: Async/Monitoring Bug
exercises.description: Investigate a subtle async bug flagged by production monitoring. Harder — requires understanding async patterns and race conditions.

steps.title: Read the monitoring log
steps.instruction: Ask Claude: 'Read the file logs/monitoring-2024-01-22.log and explain what the monitoring system has detected'

steps.title: Create a GitHub issue
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to create a GitHub issue describing the async bug and its potential impact

steps.title: Fix the bug
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to identify and fix the async issue in the source code

steps.title: Write a regression test
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to write a test that verifies the async behaviour works correctly

steps.title: Create a PR
steps.instruction: Ask Claude to create a pull request with your fix and test
